title: Pungent Gooey American Pistachio Pizza
description: A fermented, gooey, and savory American dish featuring unsalted pistachio, infused oil, and satvik-friendly ingredients, perfect for midnight cravings. This unique pizza is a twist on traditional flavors.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine warm water, yeast, and a pinch of salt, then let it sit for 5 minutes.
Add flour, pistachio, and infused oil to the bowl, mixing until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 10 minutes until it becomes smooth and elastic.
Place the dough in a greased bowl, cover it, and let it rise in a warm place for 1 hour.
Preheat the oven to 425 degrees Fahrenheit.
Punch down the dough and roll it out into a circle or rectangle shape.
Spread pizza sauce over the dough, leaving a small border around the edges.
Sprinkle mozzarella cheese over the sauce.
Bake the pizza in the preheated oven for 15-20 minutes, or until the crust is golden brown and the cheese is melted and bubbly.
